title: Dutch Currant Fritters
description: Sweet fritters filled with currants and a hint of dutch spice, perfect for a snack or dessert.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F.
In a large bowl, combine the cake mix and currants.
Add the chicken broth to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the dough into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel lined plate.
Serve the fritters warm and enjoy!
